final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of Korean café coffee and dessert for Instagram Stories, followed by hand-drawn annotations.

Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic with hand-drawn white ink annotations overlay, editorial in the style of Korean café Instagram feeds, magazine rough-note aesthetic
Composition: flat-lay overhead shot or 45-degree angle, natural smartphone framing, shallow depth of field with focus on latte art
Subject: single latte with latte art in ceramic cup, Korean-style dessert (bingsu or layered cake) on marble or wood table, no people
Scene/backdrop: minimalist Korean café interior with soft natural light, clean surfaces, plants in soft blur
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from large windows, warm and cozy atmosphere, gentle shadows
Color palette: warm cream and brown tones from coffee, soft pastels from dessert, neutral beige and white background, green plant accents
Materials/textures: ceramic cup glaze, frothy milk foam, glossy dessert glaze, natural wood grain, marble surface
Text (verbatim): "【描写规则】・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导【文本规则】・日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）・简短，像自言自语一样的评论・语气是"日记・一言・情感寄托"【评论生成规则】・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）【装饰】・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加・不过度，留出"空白"【完成风格】・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风・时尚且轻松的氛围"
Constraints: annotations must use thin white hand-drawn lines with rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style; contour lines tracing object edges; arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance; Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji); short diary-style comments; decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) applied sparingly with intentional negative space
Avoid: over-decorated cluttered look, perfect straight lines, digital-looking annotations, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
